Baseline: PiSpawner.ts branch coverage 35.29% (24/68 branches). Gap: 64.71. Uncovered lines 124-164 (#printEvent method).

Added 12 tests covering #printEvent branches: tool_execution_start (path/command/neither/name-fallback), tool_execution_end (METRIC regex, log_experiment keep/crash/discard, isError, non-text content, no content). Gap: 64.71 → 10.3.

100% branch coverage for PiSpawner.ts. Added 6 tests: whitespace line skip, no-type event, no-name tool_execution_start, no-toolName tool_execution_end, empty log_experiment text, and c8 ignore for unreachable pop() ?? branch. Also fixed benchmark.js to return 0 when file is at 100% (vitest omits 100% files from table).
